en: 5 phrasal verbs to talk about the new year Use take up to talk about starting a
ko: 새해를 말할 때 쓰는 구동사 5개. 새로운 취미나 활동을 시작할 때

en: new hobby or activity I'm going to take up boxing in the new year
ko: take up을 써. 새해에 복싱을 시작할 거야.

en: And use cut down when you use or do less of something
ko: 뭔가를 줄이거나 덜 할 때 cut down을 써.

en: I'm going to cut down on caffeine this year
No more coffee Use give up when you stop doing something that's bad for you I'm
ko: 더 이상 커피 안 마셔. 나쁜 습관을 그만둘 때 give up을 써.

en: definitely giving up chocolate this year
Use stick to when you continue doing something difficult I plan
ko: 어려운 것을 계속할 때 stick to를 써.

en: to stick to all these resolutions this year Not like last year And use look
ko: 올해는 이 결심들을 다 지킬 거야. 작년처럼은 안 할 거야. 미래에 일어날 일이

en: forward to when you feel happy about something that's going to happen in the future I'm looking forward
ko: 기대될 때 look forward to를 써. 커피 한 잔과

en: to sitting down with a nice coffee and a bit of chocolate now What are your plans for the
ko: 초콜릿 한 조각이랑 편하게 앉아 있는 게 기대돼. 올해 계획이 뭐야?

en: year Are you going to stick to them
